== Notes for [[Item:Q111074|Q111074]] ==

Died : 296 BC
--------------------
Died : 296 BC
--------------------
Died : 296 BC
--------------------
Died : 296 BC

RESEARCH NOTES:
Roman Aed. pl. 296 BC

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per09761.htm#0

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
